evidence_from_trajectory: 1 of 3 training episodes were not solved cleanly; 2 took more than the five guesses needed by binary search; 1 episodes repeated at least one guess.
failure_mode: GuessTheNumber SLM episodes wasted turns or repeated guesses
gradient_text: The prompt should force explicit interval tracking from higher/lower hints instead of unstructured guessing.
suggested_edit: Add a rule: For Guess The Number, track the current lower and upper bounds from every higher/lower hint, never repeat a previous guess, and choose the midpoint of the remaining interval.
